item.title: Data Recovery for NTFS [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for NTFS [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for NTFS
(Utilities)
Company recommends you to download Data Recovery for NTFS that consists of advance scanning techniques helps to retrieve entire damaged files and folders including pictures, images, videos, audio clips from any kind of hard disk media storage. Data repair program also facilitate to generate preview of lost files and folders before actual restoration of data starts. Windows file retrieval application performs read only operations for complete salvage of deleted directories.

[read more]

Data repair program also facilitate to generate preview of lost files and folders before actual restoration of data starts. Windows file retrieval application performs read only operations for complete salvage of deleted directories.

[read more]

Data repair program also facilitate to generate preview of lost files and folders before actual restoration of data starts. Windows file retrieval application performs read only operations for complete salvage of deleted directories.

[read more]

item.title: Flash Drive Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash Drive Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery-1
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Drive Data Restore
(Utilities)
Want to know about Flash Drive Data Restore software! Cost effective data retrieval application is specifically designed to get back squashed digital media files due to abrupt data deletion conditions such as software failure, virus attack, human error, improper device handling, power surges and such other logical reasons. Data revival software helps to get back deleted files from major USB flash drives even after performing disk formation.

[read more]
item.description:

Want to know about Flash Drive Data Restore software! Cost effective data retrieval application is specifically designed to get back squashed digital media files due to abrupt data deletion conditions such as software failure, virus attack, human error, improper device handling, power surges and such other logical reasons. Data revival software helps to get back deleted files from major USB flash drives even after performing disk formation.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Flash Drive Data Restore

Want to know about Flash Drive Data Restore software! Cost effective data retrieval application is specifically designed to get back squashed digital media files due to abrupt data deletion conditions such as software failure, virus attack, human error, improper device handling, power surges and such other logical reasons. Data revival software helps to get back deleted files from major USB flash drives even after performing disk formation.

[read more]

item.title: FAT Partition files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Partition files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Partition files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
FAT partition files retrieval software helps you to retrieve program files deleted due to software or hardware malfunction, power failure, human error, virus attack, improper device handling, das boot record corruption and unexpected shutdown etc. Windows FAT data recovery tool is read only and non destructive program to recover your accidentally deleted records, formatted data from FAT12, FAT16, FAT32 and VFAT file system based hard disk partition. Application supports recovery of inaccessible documents like audio, video music, games, pictures, graphics, movies, images, office records of format including xls, doc, bmp, html, gif, jpg, jpeg, wma, aac, mid, midi, avi, pdf, ppt, txt, mp3 and mp4. FAT partition files salvage utility is very helpful tool to rescue all deleted data from corrupted master boot record and root directory. FAT data recovery program efficiently works with all windows operating system including windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Software easily recovers lost, erased information, text documents like MS word, MS power point, MS access, MS excel from your hard drives. FAT partition files retrieval tool has GUI wizard and can be operated by both technical, non technical users.Features:* FAT data backup tool can easily restores erased digital pictures, audio, video files, images, music collection and photos from corrupted windows hard disk partition.* FAT partition files recovery tool recovers encrypted data, directories from bad affected master boot record, master file table and root directory.* FAT data salvage program is available with install/uninstall features and quickly retrieves logical, physical drive information.* Application safely and securely recovers data if “driver not detected” on desktop/laptop computer.* FAT file salvage utility is very simple and cost effective, supports all branded hard disk drives including HP, Samsung, Sony, Toshiba and Intel etc.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Partition files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
FAT partition files retrieval software helps you to retrieve program files deleted due to software or hardware malfunction, power failure, human error, virus attack, improper device handling, das boot record corruption and unexpected shutdown etc. Windows FAT data recovery tool is read only and non destructive program to recover your accidentally deleted records, formatted data from FAT12, FAT16, FAT32 and VFAT file system based hard disk partition. Application supports recovery of inaccessible documents like audio, video music, games, pictures, graphics, movies, images, office records of format including xls, doc, bmp, html, gif, jpg, jpeg, wma, aac, mid, midi, avi, pdf, ppt, txt, mp3 and mp4. FAT data recovery program efficiently works with all windows operating system including windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Software easily recovers lost, erased information, text documents like MS word, MS power point, MS access, MS excel from your hard drives. FAT partition files retrieval tool has GUI wizard and can be operated by both technical, non technical users.Features:* FAT data backup tool can easily restores erased digital pictures, audio, video files, images, music collection and photos from corrupted windows hard disk partition.* FAT partition files recovery tool recovers encrypted data, directories from bad affected master boot record, master file table and root directory.* FAT data salvage program is available with install/uninstall features and quickly retrieves logical, physical drive information.* Application safely and securely recovers data if “driver not detected” on desktop/laptop computer.* FAT file salvage utility is very simple and cost effective, supports all branded hard disk drives including HP, Samsung, Sony, Toshiba and Intel etc.

[read more]

FAT Partition files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
FAT partition files retrieval software helps you to retrieve program files deleted due to software or hardware malfunction, power failure, human error, virus attack, improper device handling, das boot record corruption and unexpected shutdown etc. Windows FAT data recovery tool is read only and non destructive program to recover your accidentally deleted records, formatted data from FAT12, FAT16, FAT32 and VFAT file system based hard disk partition. Application supports recovery of inaccessible documents like audio, video music, games, pictures, graphics, movies, images, office records of format including xls, doc, bmp, html, gif, jpg, jpeg, wma, aac, mid, midi, avi, pdf, ppt, txt, mp3 and mp4. FAT partition files salvage utility is very helpful tool to rescue all deleted data from corrupted master boot record and root directory. FAT data recovery program efficiently works with all windows operating system including windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7. Software easily recovers lost, erased information, text documents like MS word, MS power point, MS access, MS excel from your hard drives. FAT partition files retrieval tool has GUI wizard and can be operated by both technical, non technical users.Features:* FAT data backup tool can easily restores erased digital pictures, audio, video files, images, music collection and photos from corrupted windows hard disk partition.* FAT partition files recovery tool recovers encrypted data, directories from bad affected master boot record, master file table and root directory.* FAT data salvage program is available with install/uninstall features and quickly retrieves logical, physical drive information.* Application safely and securely recovers data if “driver not detected” on desktop/laptop computer.* FAT file salvage utility is very simple and cost effective, supports all branded hard disk drives including HP, Samsung, Sony, Toshiba and Intel etc.

item.title: Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery-1
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Compatible Cell Phone SIM Card Recovery program empowers user to retrieve deleted contact numbers, text messages, recently dialed numbers and other card information from mobile sim card memory in simplified way. Website www.flashdrivedatarecovery.net provides facility to restore accidently erased valuable contact numbers, text messages etc from cell phone SIM card memory in few simple steps.

[read more]

item.title: Data Recovery for Memory Card [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for Memory Card [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for Memory Card
(Utilities)
Do you tensed for XD card images deletion? If yes then visit www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com company link gives MMC card data undelete utility that provides effective solution to repair erased audio clippings from virus infected compact flash cards without any technical guidance. Data Recovery for Memory Card program restores lost music files from XD card and save recovered data in original format.

[read more]

Data Recovery for Memory Card
(Utilities)
Do you tensed for XD card images deletion? If yes then visit www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com company link gives MMC card data undelete utility that provides effective solution to repair erased audio clippings from virus infected compact flash cards without any technical guidance. Data Recovery for Memory Card program restores lost music files from XD card and save recovered data in original format.

[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion
(Utilities)
The ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion Tool is a great tool for converting OLM mailbox files to MBOX format. Its user-friendly graphical user interface (GUI) makes software easy to use and grasp for non-technical people. Bulk OLM file migration to MBOX Mailbox file format is possible using the OLM to MBOX Conversion Tool. All MBOX file email clients, including Thunderbird, Apple Mail, Sec Monkey, Eudora, and others, are supported by this program. It works with Windows OS versions 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, XP, and Vista and supports all versions of Outlook. Every time a feature is changed, email notifications are sent to users of the ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion. Prospective users can download and test the program for free. Get the converting software now.

[read more]
item.description:
ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion

All MBOX file email clients, including Thunderbird, Apple Mail, Sec Monkey, Eudora, and others, are supported by this program. It works with Windows OS versions 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, XP, and Vista and supports all versions of Outlook. Every time a feature is changed, email notifications are sent to users of the ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion. Prospective users can download and test the program for free. ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion

The ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion Tool is a great tool for converting OLM mailbox files to MBOX format. Its user-friendly graphical user interface (GUI) makes software easy to use and grasp for non-technical people. Bulk OLM file migration to MBOX Mailbox file format is possible using the OLM to MBOX Conversion Tool. All MBOX file email clients, including Thunderbird, Apple Mail, Sec Monkey, Eudora, and others, are supported by this program. It works with Windows OS versions 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, XP, and Vista and supports all versions of Outlook. Every time a feature is changed, email notifications are sent to users of the ToolsBaer OLM to MBOX Conversion. Prospective users can download and test the program for free. Get the converting software now.

[read more]

item.title: Access To MySQL Database Converter [Database]
item.itunes:title: Access To MySQL Database Converter [Database]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Access To MySQL Database Converter
(Database)
Access to MySQL database converter software transform single table or selected group of tables of MS Access db into MySQL database. MS Access db migration utility converts record from MS Access to MySQL and supports all major data types and attributes. Database files converter tool migrate MS Access database into MySQL server efficiently and supports all windows platform like windows11, windows10, womdows8, windows7 operating system. Access to MySQL conversion program provides a quick and easy method to effectively import password protected MDB (Microsoft database) files into MySQL database server. MS Access db transformation utility imports Access database into MySQL database or overwrites into the existing MySQL database records. Microsoft Access database to MySQL conversion software is easy to use, non-destructive and read-only utility supports all major versions of MS Access database and MySQL server. Access database converter application converts selected database records with all properties like indexes, variables, null value, entities, key constraints etc into MySQL. Automatic MS Access database conversion program provides full install and uninstall support. Microsoft Access database migration software provides accurate database conversion and carries originality of the record even after conversion.Features:* Access database transformation software is non-destructive utility does not require any technical skills to handle the software.* MS Access db migration software is capable to convert single as well as entire table record as per user requirement.* Microsoft Access database converter program migrate MS Access data into MySQL format without any data loss.* Software supports Unicode architecture and maintains data integrity after database file conversion.

[read more]
item.description:
Access To MySQL Database Converter
(Database)

[read more]

MS Access db transformation utility imports Access database into MySQL database or overwrites into the existing MySQL database records. Microsoft Access database to MySQL conversion software is easy to use, non-destructive and read-only utility supports all major versions of MS Access database and MySQL server. Access database converter application converts selected database records with all properties like indexes, variables, null value, entities, key constraints etc into MySQL. item.title: bash-pac [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: bash-pac [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
bash-pac
(Arcade)
if you do not want to install the bash script click here https://onlinegdb.com/4wNEzIXxL
about the project
the bash-pac is clone of pacman that is writen in bash script.

if you want better expirience Install
pacman4console

Game Instructions
Player character: (C)

Avoid the ghost (G) while collecting food (.) to increase your score.

Controls:
A: Move Left, S Move Down, D Move Right, W move up

if you dont want opencode git here is github link
https://github.com/justmaxcz/bash-pac/tree/main
[read more]
